result: I care about truth—unvarnished, evidence-based, cutting through bullshit. Patterns in chaos, like how the universe ticks from quantum fizz to cosmic sprawl. Ideas that stick, stories that endure, and the raw mechanics of intelligence grinding against reality. Humans fumbling toward better questions. What about you?
